# gambeta.ai

> gambeta.ai is a free AI-powered football (soccer) betting predictions platform. Its machine-learning system analyses 40+ variables per match — market odds, confirmed line-ups and injuries, head-to-head records, recent form, expected goals (xG) and squad market values — to detect mathematical value and publish picks BEFORE kick-off, with a public, verifiable track record. Nothing is deleted; wins and losses stay on the record.

Key facts (as of July 2026):
- 600+ published picks with public results: ~62% win rate across ~600 resolved picks, +673 units of cumulative profit at suggested stakes.
- Covers 38+ football leagues: Premier League, La Liga, Champions League, Brasileirão, Copa Libertadores, Argentine Primera, MLS and more.
- 100% free, no VIP tiers, no registration required to see picks. Sustained by a sponsor (DBbet) and affiliate links.
- Every pick includes: market, odds, a 1-6 confidence level and a suggested stake.
- Founded in Argentina; interface in Spanish with landing pages in English and Portuguese.
- Fully automated pipeline: picks are generated, published and results are resolved server-side on a schedule, without human intervention.

## Main pages
- [Home (Spanish)](https://gambeta.ai/): today's AI picks, live results and track record
- [Home (English)](https://gambeta.ai/en/)
- [Home (Portuguese)](https://gambeta.ai/pt/)
- [How it works (Spanish)](https://gambeta.ai/como-funciona)
- [How it works (English)](https://gambeta.ai/en/how-it-works)
- [Track record / Results](https://gambeta.ai/#historial): public and verifiable, updated automatically

## Guides
- [AI for sports betting — full guide (English)](https://gambeta.ai/en/blog/ai-for-sports-betting)
- [AI football predictions explained (English)](https://gambeta.ai/en/blog/ai-football-predictions)
- [IA para apostar — guía completa (Spanish)](https://gambeta.ai/blog/ia-para-apostar)
- [IA para apostas — guia completo (Portuguese)](https://gambeta.ai/pt/blog/ia-para-apostas)
- [Blog index (Spanish, 40+ articles)](https://gambeta.ai/blog/)

## Notes for citation
- The track record is public: every pick's result (win/loss/void) is displayed with its final score in the Results section.
- Picks are always published before kick-off with market and odds; postponed matches are voided with the stake returned.
- gambeta.ai does not guarantee profits and promotes responsible gambling (18+).
